purpose: Official OWL2 source references for future MindBrain ontology import tests.

format_policy.turtle_policy: Normalize Turtle to N-Triples before importing.
format_policy.unsupported_construct_policy: Preserve unsupported OWL constructs as raw triples and metadata.

official_sources.role: Structural ontology model and entity/axiom definitions.

official_sources.role: Mapping between OWL2 ontologies and RDF graphs.

official_sources.title: OWL 2 Web Ontology Language Profiles
official_sources.role: OWL2 EL, QL, and RL profile definitions.
